title: Refactor DepartmentView to use store for all state management
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/DepartmentView.tsx

Read the existing file and state.ts. Replace local-only state management with store calls:

1. Import store from ../../worker/state at the top
2. On mount (useEffect with empty deps), load projects: setProjects(store.listProjects())
3. handleCreateProject: call store.createProject then setProjects(store.listProjects())
4. handleSaveProject: call store.updateProject then refresh
5. When selecting a project: load phases from store.getPhasesByProject(id), load specs/PRDs for each phase
6. handleAddPhase: call store.createPhase then refresh phases
7. handleDeletePhase: call store.deletePhase then refresh phases
8. handleSavePhase: call store.updatePhase then refresh phases
9. handleAttachSpec: call store.createSpec with phaseId, title, sourceRef, default approvalState Pending
10. handleAttachPRD: call store.createPRD with phaseId, title, sourceRef, default approvalState Pending
11. Wire conversation ref callbacks to store.createConversationRef, updateConversationRef, deleteConversationRef
12. Build hasSpec/hasPRD maps by checking store.getSpecByPhase for each phase
13. Load spec and prd for the selected phase to pass to PhaseDetail

Remove MOCK_PROJECTS. Keep the UI structure the same. Commit.
